title: Crispy Stir-Fry Potatoes
description: A simple and delicious stir-fry dish made with crispy potatoes and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Heat the stir fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the diced potatoes and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced crunchy vegetables and cook until they are tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the potatoes and vegetables, and stir to coat.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the potatoes are crispy and the vegetables are well coated.
